definition: The complete framework combining ALL concepts into a buy/sell model. This is NOT a separate concept — it IS the dependency graph applied as a workflow.
feeds_into: entry_models (market maker model IS the Grade A trade template)
ICT_2022_model (2022 model is a time-specific implementation of market maker model)
bridge_integration: Market Maker Model fires as a single composite detector that pattern-matches the full accumulation→manipulation→distribution cycle on the M15 trigger TF. (1) Detection: bridge/ict_pipeline.py:929 calls analysis.ict.advanced.detect_market_maker_model(df_primary, swings, sweeps, direction) — only when the primary df has >=30 bars and direction is not NEUTRAL. The upstream detector (Desktop/trading-ai-v2/analysis/ict/advanced.py:817-898) enforces a 3-step algorithm: accumulation = tight range (acc_range / full_range <= 0.30 over a 20-bar lookback ending 5 bars before now); manipulation = a confirmed liquidity sweep whose wick_extreme penetrates beyond the accumulation range in the wrong direction; distribution = last close back inside the range and aligned with trade direction. confidence = 0.75 if the distribution close passed, else 0.50. The bridge gate at line 930 only accepts confidence >= 0.6, so 0.50 candidates are dropped. (2) model_type values are exactly 'MMBM' (BULLISH) or 'MMSM' (BEARISH); the more nuanced cycle types described in the card (LRSM, AMD, IPDA cycle, weekly profile) are NOT detected as separate types — code emits MMBM or MMSM only. (3) Confluence factor: ict_pipeline.py:931 appends 'MM_<type>(<conf%>)' to advanced_factors (e.g. 'MM_MMBM(75%)'). This is one of up to ~10 advanced_factors counted by ict_pipeline.py:1128-1130 toward the +10-pt advanced bonus (each factor = +2.5 pts, capped at +10). (4) Synergy: synergy_scorer.py:322-327 _wyckoff_po3_aligned matches any factor containing 'mm_' (case-insensitive) AND a 'PO3_distribution' factor; when both fire, the 'Wyckoff/PO3 alignment (institutional cycle phases confirmed)' synergy at synergy_scorer.py:461-466 awards +4. There is no MM-only synergy — the MM factor's grading impact is entirely through (a) the +2.5 advanced bonus and (b) the Wyckoff/PO3 +4 synergy when paired with PO3 distribution. (5) Prompt injection: concept_injector.py:265-267 surfaces 'market_maker_model' to the up-to-8-concept prompt block when adv_factors contains 'mm_', 'mmbm', or 'mmsm', with the inline hint 'Full institutional cycle detected'. (6) NOT a hard gate. The card's 7-step buy/sell models (HTF bias → P/D zone → PO3 → sweep → displacement → OTE → DOL) are NOT enforced as a single workflow; instead each step is enforced by a SEPARATE gate (HTF Alignment Gate, ZONE GATE, KILL ZONE GATE, sweep significance filter, displacement-required-for-OB, OTE/PD gate, DOL pre-filter). detect_market_maker_model is a confluence DETECTOR that confirms 'all three phases happened in the right shape', not the orchestrator that enforces them. (7) The card's claim that MMM IS the market_structure→premium_discount→PO3→sweep→displacement→FVG/OB→OTE→DOL pipeline is true at the workflow level — the bridge implements that exact pipeline across ict_pipeline.py + claude_decision.py — but the MM_<type> advanced_factor is just one piece of confluence within that pipeline, not the pipeline itself.

buy_model.step_2: premium_discount: Price in discount zone of dealing_range
buy_model.step_4: liquidity_sweep: Manipulation sweeps SSL (takes out lows)
buy_model.step_5: displacement: Creates FVG + OB confirming reversal
buy_model.step_6: optimal_trade_entry: Enter retracement into FVG/OB at OTE (0.618-0.705)

sell_model.step_2: premium_discount: Price in premium zone of dealing_range
sell_model.step_4: liquidity_sweep: Manipulation sweeps BSL (takes out highs)
sell_model.step_5: displacement: Creates FVG + OB confirming reversal
sell_model.step_6: optimal_trade_entry: Enter retracement into FVG/OB at OTE (0.618-0.705)
